title: Rich Salted Uruguayan Beef Stew
description: A hearty and indulgent stew featuring tender beef and rich flavors, cooked to perfection in a claypot. This satvik-friendly dish is perfect for a cold winter's night.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 300 degrees Fahrenheit.
Season the beef pieces with salt and black pepper.
Heat a claypot over medium heat and sear the beef until browned on all sides.
Add the chopped onions to the claypot and cook until they are softened.
Add the minced garlic to the claypot and cook for 1 minute.
Add the cold water, bay leaves, and thyme to the claypot and bring to a boil.
Cover the claypot with a lid and transfer it to the preheated oven.
Bake for 2 1/2 hours, or until the beef is tender.
Remove the claypot from the oven and let it cool for 10 minutes.
Serve the stew hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
